calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-03-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Stanley Riddell, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Edmund Ng and Sophie Ng, also present in court.
Defendant: Alex McKay, present in pro per.
Co-Defendant: Chris R. Galbraith, not present, Defaulted and Default Entered on 7-8-05, and no longer in possession of the property.
Matter settled, terms read into the record as follows: Parties stipulated for an ENTRY of JUDGMENT for resitution and possession, stayed until 9:00 A.M. of Aug. 4, 2005.
Defendant shall vacate the subject property in clean condition with normal wears and tears, and return keys to the Plaintiffs.
Any property left behind will be disposed off by the Plaintiffs.
If Defendant failed to vacate, Judgment for Plaintiffs in the amount of $7,950.00 for back- due rent and per diem hold over of $2,650.00 for July 2005. Attorney's fees of 1,034.00 and costs of $588.61.
Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, Trial vacated.
Counsel to prepare Stipulation for Entry of Judgment and Judgment.

Aug. 3, 2005
Judgment signed by Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire.
